# 🛒 E-Commerce System using Core Java

## 📌 Overview

This is a console-based E-Commerce System developed using Core Java and Maven. The project demonstrates Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) concepts and allows users to manage products, shopping carts, and orders.

---

## 🚀 Features

* Customer Registration
* View Products
* Search Products
* Add Product to Cart
* View Cart
* Update Cart Quantity
* Remove Product from Cart
* Checkout
* GST Calculation (18%)
* Auto Generated Order ID
* View Order History

---

## 🛠 Technologies Used

* Core Java
* Maven
* IntelliJ IDEA
* Collections Framework
* Git & GitHub

---

## 📂 Project Structure

```text
com.ecommerce
│
├── Products
├── cart
├── Orders
├── Cusomers
└── ECommerceSystem
```

---

## 🎯 OOP Concepts Used

* Inheritance
* Polymorphism
* Abstraction
* Encapsulation
* Composition
* Method Overriding
* Static Members

---

## ▶️ How to Run

1. Clone the repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/ac-mishra/E-Commerce-System-using-Core-Java.git
```

2. Open the project in IntelliJ IDEA

3. Run:

```text
ECommerceSystem.java
```
